class.name: PhysicsShapeCastResult3D
class.brief_description: Stores the result of a shape motion cast query.
class.description: This class contains the safe and unsafe fractions computed by [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.cast_motion].

method.name: get_collision_safe_fraction
method.description: Returns the maximum fraction of the motion that can be performed without colliding.

method.name: get_collision_unsafe_fraction
method.description: Returns the minimum fraction of the motion at which a collision occurs.
